2026-0315
2026-04-09ESDCDepartment of Employment and Social Development ActActing Designation of the commissioner of the Canada Employment Insurance Commission representing workersDesignation of Christopher Keith Roberts of Ottawa, Ontario, to act as commissioner of the Canada Employment Insurance Commission representing workers, for a term of eighteen months or until such time as a new Commissioner is designated, whichever occurs first, effective April 13, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Employment and Social Development Act
subject: Acting Designation of the commissioner of the Canada Employment Insurance Commission representing workers
precis: Designation of Christopher Keith Roberts of Ottawa, Ontario, to act as commissioner of the Canada Employment Insurance Commission representing workers, for a term of eighteen months or until such time as a new Commissioner is designated, whichever occurs first, effective April 13, 2026.
